title: lactuca inermis var. inermis
intro: Lactuca inermis var. inermis, also known as Prickly Lettuce, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, relieve pain, and reduce anxiety. The medicinal properties of Lactuca inermis var. inermis have been linked to several health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced sleep quality. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a dried herb in various herbal blends.
